languages.text: "По крайней мере мы точно знаем, где искать твое творение, Эоганн. Мастер вокса, мы выдвигаемся".
"At least we know exactly where to look for your creation, Eogunn. Vox Master, we are on our way."
languages.original_text: "По крайней мере мы точно знаем, где искать твое творение, Эоганн. Мастер вокса, мы выдвигаемся".

traits.locale_text: "At least we know exactly where to look for your creation, Eogunn. Vox Master, we are on our way."
"At least we know exactly where to look for your creation, Eogunn. Vox Master, we are on our way."
"At least we know exactly where to look for your creation, Eogunn. Vox Master, we are on our way."

languages.text: 「少なくとも、あなたの創造物を探す場所がはっきりしている、エオガン。ヴォックス・マスター、私たちは向かっている」
languages.original_text: "At least we know exactly where to look for your creation, Eogunn. Vox Master, we are on our way."

traits.locale_text: 「少なくとも、あなたの創造物を探す場所がはっきりしているわ、エオグン。ヴォックス・マスター、私たちは向かっています。」

languages.text: “至少我们知道该去哪里寻找你的造物了，伊奥贡。音阵大师，我们立即出发。”
languages.original_text: "At least we know exactly where to look for your creation, Eogunn. Vox Master, we are on our way."

traits.locale_text: “至少我们知道该去哪里寻找你的造物了，伊奥贡。音阵大师，我们立即出发。”

languages.text: «Al menos sabemos exactamente dónde encontrar su creación, Eogunn. Maestra de vocos, estamos de camino».
languages.original_text: "At least we know exactly where to look for your creation, Eogunn. Vox Master, we are on our way."

traits.locale_text: «Al menos sabemos exactamente dónde encontrar su creación, Eogunn. Maestra de vocos, estamos de camino».

languages.text: "Immerhin wissen wir genau, wo wir Eure Kreation suchen müssen, Eogunn. Voxmeisterin, wir sind unterwegs."
languages.original_text: "At least we know exactly where to look for your creation, Eogunn. Vox Master, we are on our way."

traits.locale_text: "Immerhin wissen wir genau, wo wir Eure Kreation suchen müssen, Eogunn. Voxmeisterin, wir sind unterwegs."

languages.text: « Au moins, nous savons où chercher votre création, Eogunn. Maîtresse-vox, nous sommes en route. »
languages.original_text: "At least we know exactly where to look for your creation, Eogunn. Vox Master, we are on our way."

traits.locale_text: « Au moins, nous savons où chercher votre création, Eogunn. Maîtresse-vox, nous sommes en route. »

languages.text: "En azından yaratımınızı tam olarak nerede arayacağımızı biliyoruz Eogunn. Voks Üstadı, yola çıkıyoruz."
languages.original_text: "At least we know exactly where to look for your creation, Eogunn. Vox Master, we are on our way."

traits.locale_text: "En azından yaratımınızı tam olarak nerede arayacağımızı biliyoruz Eogunn. Voks Üstadı, yola çıkıyoruz."
